calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Continued To May-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Northerner Scandinavia Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH's Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Northerner Scandinavia Inc.

Motion for court approval and entry of consent judgment as to defendant Northerner Scandinavia is granted. The court will sign the proposed order and consent judgment.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
